violations.text: Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, pork was placed hot and covered in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Pork was transferred to sheet pans at the time of inspection. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The door to the outside, located in the hallway outside of kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025
The sanitizer dispenser at the 3-bay sink was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Per PIC, service has been called. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2025
The floor in the walk-in cooler area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2026
The condensate from the ice machine is draining onto the floor. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the warewashing area and mop sink area is in poor repair, observed missing tiles throughout. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

The floor in the walk-in cooler area is in poor repair, observed gap in floor with incomplete seal. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

Milk was observed held at 46-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
Observed slicer to have rusty and torn screws. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
Observed freezer to have frost buildup. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024
